questions.question: In Cartesian coordinates, (3, 4) means 3 units up and 4 units right.
questions.explanation: It means 3 units right and 4 units up. x is horizontal, y is vertical. x comes first.

questions.question: What are the coordinates of the origin?
questions.explanation: The origin is where the axes cross: (0, 0). Both x and y are zero there.

questions.question: In 3D Cartesian, a point needs (x, y, z).
questions.explanation: Yes, add z for depth. Three values: how far right, how far up, how far back.
